'''√n-sh-th''' ('''kanashath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quininize|quininize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-sh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quininize|quininize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √n-sh-th
|-
! Lemma
| kanashath
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thinashath || jinashath || shinashath || kinashath
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthunashath || jujunashath || shushunashath || kukunashath
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thunashath || junashath || shunashath || kunashath
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thunashath || junashath || shunashath || kunashath
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thenashath || jenashath || shenashath || kenashath
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothonashath || jojonashath || shoshonashath || kokonashath
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thonashath || jonashath || shonashath || konashath
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thonashath || jonashath || shonashath || konashath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || nashath || nashath || nashath || nashath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || nashath || nashath || nashath || nashath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || nashath || nashath || nashath || nashath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || nashath || nashath || nashath || nashath
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thænashath || jænashath || shænashath || kænashath
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathanashath || jajanashath || shashanashath || kakanashath
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thanashath || janashath || shanashath || kanashath
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thanashath || janashath || shanashath || kanashath
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shanashath
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshanashath
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishanashath
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shanashathnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshanashathnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishanashathnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shanashathshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshanashathnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishanashathshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shanashathro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshanashathnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishanashathro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shanashathmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshanashathnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishanashathmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shanashathsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshanashathnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishanashathsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shanashathng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshanashathnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishanashathng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shanashathya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshanashathnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishanashathya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shanashathyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshanashathnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishanashathyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shanashathnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshanashathnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishanashathnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shanashathnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshanashathnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishanashathnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shanashathnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshanashathnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishanashathnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shanashathshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshanashathnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishanashathshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shanashathshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshanashathnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishanashathshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shanashathshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshanashathnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishanashathshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shanashathronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshanashathnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishanashathronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shanashathroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshanashathnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishanashathroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shanashathromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshanashathnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishanashathromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shanashathmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshanashathnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishanashathmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shanashathmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshanashathnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishanashathmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shanashathmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshanashathnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishanashathmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
